sentences.english: Do you think it is better to rent or buy a home?
sentences.korean: 집을 임대하는 것과 사는 것 중 어느 것이 더 낫다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: For young professionals I believe renting is the smarter choice in most situations.
sentences.korean: 젊은 직장인에게는 대부분의 상황에서 임대가 더 현명한 선택이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First renting provides flexibility — if you get a job offer in another city you can simply move without the hassle of selling a property.
sentences.korean: 첫째 임대는 유연성을 제공해요 — 다른 도시에서 취업 제안을 받으면 부동산 매매의 번거로움 없이 간단히 이사할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: Second homeownership comes with hidden costs like property taxes maintenance and repair expenses that renters don't have to worry about.
sentences.korean: 둘째 주택 소유에는 재산세 유지비 수리비 같은 숨겨진 비용이 따르는데 임차인은 걱정할 필요가 없어요.

sentences.english: That said owning a home is a great long-term investment for people who plan to stay in one place for many years.
sentences.korean: 그렇긴 해도 한 곳에 오래 머물 계획인 사람에게는 주택 소유가 훌륭한 장기 투자예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Skill You Want to Learn
